description: Parts of this utility light have a curved appearance, as though the metal were grown in a lab.  Its single, round bulb will emit light if connected to power.

A huge, pot-bellied device that resembles something between a coal-burning stove and a boiler, with a wide, hinged cage covering the combustion chamber.  Three unmarked gauges sit like alien eyes upon its face.  A side-mounted crank is its only visible control.  In defiance of its apparent function, it has no exhaust vent; in its place is a hose twisted on itself several times, coiled in copper, and terminating in a bulbous back-mounted battery pack.
